text:
On 2013-12-30 11:33, William Grzybowski wrote:
> Can you please provide a patch using diff -u or svn patch?

There you go. You may have to create a file directory beforehand since 
patching the configure script is necessary and the change would be a bit 
hard to do with sed or awk.

-- Matthieu Volat
